languages.text: {n}Экзальт-117 замер возле турелей. Тело {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} мелко вибрирует, а из его вокс-передатчика доносятся ритмичные звуки. Магос кажется полностью поглощенным техномедитацией, но как только вы делаете еще один шаг ближе, его голова поворачивается к вам.{/n} "Вы вторглись в радиус священного ритуала. Какова цель сближения?"
languages.translation_comment: Приветствие если играет DL_ExaltRepairTurrets и фаза 1

traits.locale_text: {n}Экзальт-117 замер возле турелей. Тело {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} мелко вибрирует, а из его вокс-передатчика доносятся ритмичные звуки. Магос кажется полностью поглощенным техномедитацией, но как только вы делаете еще один шаг ближе, его голова поворачивается к вам.{/n} "Вы вторглись в радиус священного ритуала. Какова цель сближения?"

languages.translation_comment: Приветствие если играет DL_ExaltRepairTurrets и фаза 1

languages.text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"
languages.original_text: {n}Экзальт-117 замер возле турелей. Тело {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} мелко вибрирует, а из его вокс-передатчика доносятся ритмичные звуки. Магос кажется полностью поглощенным техномедитацией, но как только вы делаете еще один шаг ближе, его голова поворачивается к вам.{/n} "Вы вторглись в радиус священного ритуала. Какова цель сближения?"

The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

languages.text: {n}尊使-117一动不动地站在炮台旁。这位{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的身躯微微震颤，音阵传输器中传出有节奏的声响。贤者似乎完全沉浸于技术冥想之中，但当你又迈近一步时，他的头转向了你。{/n}“你已进入神圣仪式的范围。请说明你的来意。”
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

traits.locale_text: {n}尊使-117一动不动地站在炮台旁。这位{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的身躯微微震颤，音阵传输器中传出有节奏的声响。贤者似乎完全沉浸于技术冥想之中，但当你又迈近一步时，他的头转向了你。{/n}“你已进入神圣仪式的范围。请说明你的来意。”

languages.text: {n}Exalt-117 se tient près des tourelles sans bouger. Son corps vibre légèrement tandis que son transmetteur-vox diffuse des sons rythmiques. Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} semble complètement absorbé par sa technoméditation, mais lorsque vous vous approchez, il se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Vous avez pénétré dans le rayon du rituel sacré. Quel est l'objectif de votre venue ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Exalt-117 se tient près des tourelles sans bouger. Son corps vibre légèrement tandis que son transmetteur-vox diffuse des sons rythmiques. Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} semble complètement absorbé par sa technoméditation, mais lorsque vous vous approchez, il se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Vous avez pénétré dans le rayon du rituel sacré. Quel est l'objectif de votre venue ? »

languages.text: {n}Yüce-117, taretlerin yakınında hareketsiz duruyor. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip'in{/g} vücudu belli belirsiz titriyor, voks vericisinden ritmik sesler geliyor. Magos, tüm benliğiyle tekno meditasyona dalmış gibi görünüyor ancak bir adım daha yaklaştığında kafası sana dönüyor.{/n} "Kutsal ayinin yarıçapına girmiş bulunmaktasınız. Yaklaşmanızın amacı nedir?"
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüce-117, taretlerin yakınında hareketsiz duruyor. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip'in{/g} vücudu belli belirsiz titriyor, voks vericisinden ritmik sesler geliyor. Magos, tüm benliğiyle tekno meditasyona dalmış gibi görünüyor ancak bir adım daha yaklaştığında kafası sana dönüyor.{/n} "Kutsal ayinin yarıçapına girmiş bulunmaktasınız. Yaklaşmanızın amacı nedir?"

languages.text: {n}Exaltado-117 permanece inmóvil junto a las torretas. El cuerpo del {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} vibra sutilmente y su voco transmisor emite unos sonidos rítmicos. El magos parece totalmente absorto en su tecnomeditación, pero en cuanto te acercas un paso más, su cabeza se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Ha entrado en el radio del ritual sagrado. ¿Cuál es el objetivo de esta aproximación?».
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Exaltado-117 permanece inmóvil junto a las torretas. El cuerpo del {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} vibra sutilmente y su voco transmisor emite unos sonidos rítmicos. El magos parece totalmente absorto en su tecnomeditación, pero en cuanto te acercas un paso más, su cabeza se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Ha entrado en el radio del ritual sagrado. ¿Cuál es el objetivo de esta aproximación?».

languages.text: {n}Exalt-117 steht in der Nähe der Geschütze. Der Körper des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriesters{/g} vibriert unmerklich, während aus seinem Vox-Transmitter rhythmische Geräusche ertönen. Der Magos scheint vollständig in eine Tech-Meditation versunken zu sein, wendet dir aber den Kopf zu, als du dich ihm weiter näherst.{/n} "Ihr habt den Radius des heiligen Rituals betreten. Was ist das Ziel Eurer Annäherung?"
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Exalt-117 steht in der Nähe der Geschütze. Der Körper des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriesters{/g} vibriert unmerklich, während aus seinem Vox-Transmitter rhythmische Geräusche ertönen. Der Magos scheint vollständig in eine Tech-Meditation versunken zu sein, wendet dir aber den Kopf zu, als du dich ihm weiter näherst.{/n} "Ihr habt den Radius des heiligen Rituals betreten. Was ist das Ziel Eurer Annäherung?"

languages.text: {n}エクサルト117は砲塔の近くで動いていません。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}テクプリストの{/g}体は微妙に振動しており、ボイス送信機からリズムのある音が聞こえます。マゴスは完全にテク瞑想に没頭しているように見えますが、あなたがさらに近づくと、彼の頭があなたの方を向きます。{/n}「あなたは聖なる儀式の範囲に入りました。あなたの接近の目的は何ですか？」
languages.original_text: {n}Exalt-117 is stationary near the turrets. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest's{/g} body is vibrating subtly, with rhythmic sounds coming from his vox-transmitter. The Magos seems completely absorbed in tech-meditation, but as you take another step closer, his head turns toward you.{/n} "You have entered the radius of the sacred ritual. What is the objective of your approach?"
